name: Cranberry-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter or margarine until softened. Add brown sugar and beat until fluffy. Beat in the egg, milk, and orange peel; stir in the dry ingredients until just combined.
3. Stir in the oats, cranberries, and chopped walnuts.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F (190°C) oven for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks.
6. For the orange icing, combine powdered sugar, orange peel, vanilla, and enough orange juice to reach pouring consistency.
Orange Icing:
1/ cup Powdered sugar
1/2 teaspoon Orange peel, shredded
1/4 teaspoon Vanilla
1-2 tablespoons Orange juice
